programme.title: The Forsytes on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Disaster strikes at Forsyte & Co. as Soames puts an end to Irene's Parisian dreams; Louisa faces a shock eviction.

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Edmond continues to infiltrate the lives of his betrayers, uncovering more dark secrets; Mercedes starts to suspect Edmond's true identity.

programme.title: Murder in the Mountains
programme.desc: The death of a young tech genius leaves Nina and Lukas suspicious of his business partner.

programme.title: Austin City Limits
programme.desc: Country Music Hall of Famer Tanya Tucker sings songs from "Sweet Western Sound"; Brittney Spencer performs songs from her debut "My Stupid Life.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Caverns Sessions
programme.desc: Formed in 1973, The Headhunters offer funky synth-driven rock compositions as well as reimagined jazz standards.

programme.title: Shakespeare: Rise of a Genius
programme.desc: William Shakespeare leaves the small rural town of Stratford to pursue his dream of becoming a playwright in the dangerous, growing metropolis of London; public theatre is red-hot modernity and Shakespeare begins his journey at the very bottom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Shakespeare: Rise of a Genius
programme.desc: A 30-year-old Shakespeare is at the top of his game -- he's got a job at England's best theater company, the Lord Chamberlain's Men and the money is rolling in; a tragedy leads to the creation of "Hamlet.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Treasures of New York
programme.desc: A Living Memorial to the Holocaust Situated on the southern tip of Manhattan, the Museum of Jewish Heritage - A Living Memorial to the Holocaust dedicates itself to preserving one of humanity's darkest moments in the hopes of building a better future. In Treasures of New York: Museum of Jewish Heritage, see how this remarkable institution educates through remembrance, combats hate, and ensures that the past is not forgotten.

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: A body is found in a local mill.

programme.title: Tradfest: The Fingal Sessions
programme.desc: Host Fiachna Ó Braonáin with blues legend Eric Bibb, new blues sensation Muireann Bradley and Grammy winning fiddle player Eileen Ivers.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine bets Arthur that her family uses less water; Arthur and D.W. believe they will find treasures in the attic that will make them famous.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: Bring a Grown-Up to Work Day; Nice Day for an Odd Wedding
programme.desc: Orli and Ozzie must find two grown-ups lost in HQ; Odd Squad goes undercover at a villain wedding.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Martin and Chris stumble upon a rare and endangered seedling of a butternut tree; while looking for its parent tree, they only discover dead ones.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters try to help an injured bird so it can join its friends migrating south for the winter.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Mysterious Cake; Kibbles and Tricks
programme.desc: Lyla bakes a cake without a recipe; Everett teaches his cat new tricks using sounds and symbols.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: The Remote Control Collection; The Super Blue Moon Sleepover
programme.desc: Forrest can't wait to try everything at the Fuzzytown Friends Picnic, but gets into trouble when he is unable to wait his turn; Carl hosts a Super Blue Moon Sleepover.

programme.sub-title: Find What Makes Your Family Special; Family Day
programme.desc: Katerina wishes she had a little sister; the Tiger family performs a special song during Family Day at the library.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay are asked to bird sit; photo time leads Jay to an outfit disaster.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Cinderella needs to tell time for the ball, but her clock is broken, so Nina, Abby and Rudy wonder what tool they can use to fix it.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.desc: When Bex removes her cochlear implant and hearing aid so she can go on the waterslide, Sammy and the Wombats find new ways to communicate; the Wombats love Leiko's new mural.

programme.title: Let's Learn
programme.sub-title: Can You Hear the Long "o" in Whole?
programme.desc: Exploring teen numbers; reading "Gross Greg" and "Same, Same but Different"; reviewing long o and i.

programme.sub-title: Rocks Rock; A Birthday for Bibi
programme.desc: While helping Ms. Beaver construct a community garden the kids learn about rocks; Elinor tries to make her special dumplings all by herself.

programme.sub-title: We Are the Wright Brothers; We Are the Bronte Sisters

programme.desc: Flo Braker prepares petits fours, ladyfingers, madeleines and miniature Florentine squares.

programme.desc: Opposition in colonial North America to British policies over taxes, land and sovereignty escalates into violent confrontation; war gives 13 colonies a common cause.

programme.title: Wild Kratts

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: After a groundhog predicts more winter weather, Benny is convinced he will have snow on his birthday so he plans a snow-filled birthday party.
